_说明: QA 质检规则。qa.js 在生成完成后对照此文件检查每篇文章。hardFail 任一触发则文章不进入发布包，状态标记为 failed。warnings 触发后文章仍可发布，但 QA 分数扣减，日志中记录。

hardFail.message: Output does not contain an <article> tag. Article HTML must be wrapped in <article>...</article>.
hardFail._说明: 程序要求所有输出用 article 标签包裹，缺失则无法写入输出文件

hardFail.message: Article word count is below the minimum for this article type. Check article-types.json → wordRange[0].
hardFail._说明: 字数低于类型最低值的 80% 则触发

hardFail.message: Article contains one or more expressions from site.json → mustNotSay[]. Remove or replace before publishing.
hardFail._说明: 扫描全文，mustNotSay 数组中每个词/短语都触发检查

hardFail.message: Article contains an unfilled placeholder, TODO, [bracket content], or editor note. All markers must be resolved before publishing.
hardFail._说明: 匹配：TODO, PLACEHOLDER, [需要一手经验], [待插入], [填写], \[.*?\], <!-- editor

hardFail.message: Article does not contain an 'About this article' author block. Required for E-E-A-T compliance.
hardFail._说明: 检测 'About this article' 或 'Written by' 字符串存在

hardFail.message: Article does not contain an H1 heading.
H1 does not contain the primary keyword or a close variant. SEO requirement not met.
hardFail._说明: 将 H1 文本与 keywords.csv → keyword 字段做宽松匹配

hardFail.message: Article mentions a kit but does not disclose difficulty level (Intermediate / Advanced) and estimated build time. Required by difficultyDisclosureRule.
hardFail._说明: 仅当文章类型为 buying-guide / how-to / comparison / listicle / pillar 时触发；FAQ 和 price-guide 豁免

hardFail.message: Article contains a forbidden product descriptor: 'easy', 'simple', 'beginner-friendly', 'premium', 'magical', 'high quality', 'stunning', 'beautiful', 'life-changing', 'perfect for everyone'. Replace with a specific, verifiable description.
hardFail._说明: 完整黑名单：easy, simple, beginner-friendly, premium craftsmanship, high quality, magical experience, stunning, beautiful (用于产品描述时), life-changing, perfect for everyone, handmade, ethically sourced

hardFail.message: Article contains an unresolved E-E-A-T marker: '【需要一手经验】'. All first-person experience markers must be replaced with real content before publishing.
hardFail._说明: 检测 '需要一手经验' 字符串

warnings.message: No CTA detected. Every article should end with a call-to-action linking to a product or category page.
No internal links detected. Add at least 2 links to pillar pages and 1 to a category page.
Internal link count is below the minimum for this article type. Check article-types.json → internalLinkExpectations.
No link to a pillar page detected. Every article must link to at least 2 pillar pages from links.json → pillarPages[].
No FAQ section detected. FAQ sections improve E-E-A-T signals and long-tail keyword coverage.
No product page link detected. Articles in this category should naturally reference at least one specific kit with a product link.
Meta description is missing from the publish package.
Meta description exceeds 155 characters. Trim to avoid truncation in search results.
No Schema JSON-LD detected in the publish package. Add the schema type recommended in article-types.json.

Article contains generic AI-style phrasing that conflicts with the configured brand voice. Check for: 'Furthermore', 'In conclusion', 'It's worth noting', 'Dive in', 'Game-changing', 'Seamlessly', 'Delve into'.
Difficulty and build time were not disclosed at the first kit mention. Move disclosure to first product reference.
Opening sentence does not follow any of the three templates in article-types.json → openingTemplates[]. Revise the opening.
keywords.csv → cannibalcheck field is not empty. Verify this article is sufficiently differentiated from the flagged existing article before publishing.
warnings._说明: 分数不扣减，但会在 QA 报告里标红提示运营人员手动核查

scoreWeights._说明: 五个维度总分 100。每个维度满分值如下，hardFail 触发时总分强制为 0，不计算各维度。

seoStructure.description: H1 含关键词 / 内链数量和质量 / Meta Description 存在且长度合适 / Schema 存在 / 开头句含关键词

brandFit.description: 符合品牌语气（无泛用 AI 腔）/ 无 mustNotSay 违规 / 无禁用产品形容词 / 开头句使用规定模板

helpfulness.description: 有 FAQ / 有具体操作细节 / 难度和时间已披露 / 产品自然植入 / 作者署名存在 / EEAT 标记已替换

readability.description: 段落长度合理 / 无连续长段落 / 有小标题分段 / 无占位符或 TODO

publishReadiness.description: 有 CTA / Meta Description 存在 / Schema 存在 / article 标签存在 / 无未填写标记
